mechanics.excerpt: Those who travel regularly have several other options_ Frequent travelers can increase the range of worlds where their card accepted usually for fee of about ,000 Cbills per world per year. They arrange shadov accounts' with local banks the records of which are reconciled with their home bank ComStar'$ HPG network.
